properties.name: camel.language.datasonnet.body-media-type
properties.description: The media type of the message body, such as application/json.

properties.name: camel.language.datasonnet.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable auto configuration of the datasonnet language. This is enabled by default.

properties.name: camel.language.datasonnet.output-media-type
properties.description: The media type to use for the output result.

properties.name: camel.language.datasonnet.source
properties.description: Source to use, instead of message body. You can prefix with variable:, header:, or property: to specify kind of source. Otherwise, the source is assumed to be a variable. Use empty or null to use default source, which is the message body.

properties.name: camel.language.datasonnet.trim
properties.description: Whether to trim the source code to remove leading and trailing whitespaces and line breaks.
